Folianten</VOLUME> um <PRIZE>6. fl.</PRIZE> gedrucket wird</BIBL>. Ferner ist allda neue fertig worden: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lutheri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Bibel</TITLE> mit Figuren in <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL>; Item, des Herrn Abbts <BIBL><AUTHOR>Fleury</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Kirchen-Historien</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem frantzösischen ubersetzt</BIBL>; Item, <BIBL><TITLE>die gantze Pflicht des Menschen</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem Englischen ubersetzt</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":8,"explanation":"Corrected XML structure and encoding issues. 1) Fixed malformed TITLE tag in first BIBL (removed premature closing tag). 2) Added missing BIBL tag around the Fleury entry. 3) Decoded mojibake characters (e.g., \\u221a\\u00bc to ü/ß, \\u221a\\u00a7 to ä) to restore proper German orthography. 4) Corrected historical text errors ('Patter' to 'Vatter', 'avelichem' to 'adelichem', 'ne...' to 'neue'). 5) Fixed price indicator encoding."}
